commands.review_summary:
The branch broadens stale approval error classification and reuses it across exec/plugin approval waits for before_tool_call, Codex app-server approvals, and native hook relay, with focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source +26, Tests +107. Total +133 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main can emit `approval expired or not found` from `plugin.approval.waitDecision` while the shared classifier does not match that text, and the affected wait paths currently let it fall into generic failure handling.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] A maintainer should wait for contributor-supplied real behavior proof or explicitly override that gate; this review found no narrow code repair for ClawSweeper to attempt.

target.title: fix(approvals): handle stale plugin waits
target.body:
## Summary
- Extend the shared approval-not-found classifier to cover the gateway waitDecision stale-id message `approval expired or not found`.
- Reuse that classifier in plugin approval waits for before_tool_call, Codex app-server approvals, native hook relay PermissionRequest approvals, and the existing exec approval wait path.
- Preserve fail-closed behavior for stale plugin approval waits while leaving unrelated gateway errors exceptional or on their existing unavailable path.

Closes #88111.

## Validation
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/approval-errors.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.before-tool-call.e2e.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/approval-bridge.test.ts src/agents/harness/native-hook-relay.approval-wait.test.ts` -> 4 files / 47 tests passed.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.e2e.config.ts src/agents/agent-tools.before-tool-call.e2e.test.ts` -> 48 tests passed.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/codex/src/app-server/approval-bridge.test.ts` -> 41 tests passed.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/harness/native-hook-relay.test.ts src/agents/harness/native-hook-relay.approval-wait.test.ts src/infra/approval-errors.test.ts` -> 5 files / 150 tests passed.
- `pnpm check:test-types` -> passed.
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 ...touched files...` -> passed.
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxlint ...touched files...` -> passed.
- `git diff --check` -> passed.
- `node scripts/check-changed.mjs --base upstream/main` -> passed.

## Real behavior proof
- **Behavior addressed:** Stale or missing `plugin.approval.waitDecision` approval ids now fail closed as typed unavailable/deferred approval outcomes instead of surfacing as generic runtime/tool failures.
- **Real environment tested:** Local OpenClaw source checkout on macOS with Node 24.15.0 and the current upstream/main base `584fa3215c`; hydrated with `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`.
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch:** Ran the focused approval harnesses against the patched source tree: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/approval-errors.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.before-tool-call.e2e.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/approval-bridge.test.ts src/agents/harness/native-hook-relay.approval-wait.test.ts`, plus the broader issue acceptance files and `node scripts/check-changed.mjs --base upstream/main`.
- **Evidence after fix:** Terminal output from the after-fix run:
```text
$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/approval-errors.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.before-tool-call.e2e.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/approval-bridge.test.ts src/agents/harness/native-hook-relay.approval-wait.test.ts
RUN  v4.1.7 /Users/andy/openclaw-88111-stale-approval
Test Files  4 passed (4)
Tests  47 passed (47)
Duration  3.73s

$ node scripts/check-changed.mjs --base upstream/main
[check:changed] lanes=core, coreTests, extensions, extensionTests
[check:changed] typecheck core
[check:changed] typecheck core tests
[check:changed] typecheck extensions
[check:changed] typecheck extension tests
[check:changed] lint core
[check:changed] lint extensions
[check:changed] runtime import cycles
Import cycle check: 0 runtime value cycle(s).
```
- **Observed result after fix:** The before_tool_call path returns `Plugin approval unavailable (stale approval)` and blocks even when timeoutBehavior is allow; Codex app-server returns `{ decision: "decline" }` and emits an `unavailable` approval event; native hook relay PermissionRequest returns a no-op/defer response instead of throwing; the shared classifier matches both stale approval messages.
- **What was not tested:** I did not run a live browser approval UI or restart a real gateway mid-approval; the proof drives the production source paths with focused gateway stale-id responses and includes the changed-lanes type/lint/test gate.

## Attribution
If this PR is squash-merged or reworked, please preserve commit author attribution for Andy Ye <35905412+TurboTheTurtle@users.noreply.github.com> or include `Co-authored-by: Andy Ye <35905412+TurboTheTurtle@users.noreply.github.com>`.
